productDisplayName: Lotto Men Black Pesa Slip-On Casual Shoes
description: lotto shoes - the one stop shop for quality footwear with optimal durability. This Pesa slip-on shoe with its laceless styling and padded inner is sure to become a closet favourite. Referenced from the skate and surf culture, but crafted for all comfort junkies, style this sockless shoe with shorts; it's a perfect slip-on when you're in a hurry! Upper Synthetic upper with synthetic overlays Reinforced overlay at the heel collar Slip on style Padded tongue with branding Padded fabric inner Midsole Rubber midsole for cushioned comfort Outsole Circular lugs on the outsole Curved midfoot for ergonomic comfort Outsole reinforced onto the upper to act as a heel guard Shoe care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
